homeDesc: Overview of your environmental performance and compliance.
marketplaceDesc: B2B marketplace for recyclable materials. List, buy or collect.
carbonDesc: Calculate your Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions and track your reduction plan.
esgDesc: Generate your CSRD, GHG Protocol and GRI compliant report.
traceabilityDesc: Your transactions certified on Polygon with verified CO₂ avoided.
rseDesc: CSR diagnostic and preparation for B Corp, Lucie, GreenTech labels.
complianceDesc: Automatic assessment of your compliance across 37 environmental standards.
externalDesc: Enter your external activities to enrich your compliance score.
